global_style: pleasant light cybersecurity mission-control UI aesthetic, warm off-white #f7f9fb, mist-blue #eaf4ff, cyan #00aeea, mint #22c78a, pale slate #253140, hairline geometry, frosted-glass subtlety, faint paper grain, restrained premium polish
